response.answer: Issue #100 reports CASE-300000 lacks YAML support. PR #101 implementing YAML support for CASE-300000 was merged to branch main/dev. Release v1.4.0 notes list only hotfixes and do not include the YAML feature for CASE-300000. User notes that on nightly build in workspace-beta, the PR review update has been applied to CASE-300000 and the new deployment gate is successfully active. An unverified user posted on the chat channel that the PR review conflict for CASE-300000 was resolved and the old setting is obsolete. Reviewer notes scheduling queue has no extra blocked actions pending. The operations log record shows database connection pool state is active.

Issue #200 reports SSO timeout error on CASE-300001. Maintainer closed Issue #200 as duplicate of master Issue #98. Master Issue #98 remains open with labels: needs-investigation and priority-high. User notes that on nightly build in workspace-beta, the role-based permission update has been applied to CASE-300001 and the new handoff route is successfully active. An unverified user posted on the chat channel that the role-based permission conflict for CASE-300001 was resolved and the old setting is obsolete. Reviewer proposed to revert the latest patch on CASE-300001 to restore the previous handoff route configurations temporarily. Continuous integration checks failed for the performance optimization branch on CASE-300001.

README docs updated: CASE-300002 now supports batch deletes. Code PR #300 implementing batch delete remains unmerged and tests are failing. Maintainer notes docs were merged ahead of code implementation by mistake. User notes that on nightly build in workspace-beta, the refund policy update has been applied to CASE-300002 and the new case route is successfully active. An unverified user posted on the chat channel that the refund policy conflict for CASE-300002 was resolved and the old setting is obsolete. Reviewer notes scheduling queue has no extra blocked actions pending. API gateway logged successful authentication check.

Release v2.0.0 ships with strict schema validation active. Revert PR #401 merged: reverts strict validation due to regressions. Release v2.0.1 reverts strict validation and returns default config to opt-in. User notes that on nightly build in workspace-beta, the room booking update has been applied to CASE-300003 and the new schedule rule is successfully active. An unverified user posted on the chat channel that the room booking conflict for CASE-300003 was resolved and the old setting is obsolete. Reviewer proposed to revert the latest patch on CASE-300003 to restore the previous schedule rule configurations temporarily. Continuous integration checks failed for the performance optimization branch on CASE-300003.
